---
title: "Miz Maze, or, The Winkworth Puzzle: A Story in Letters by Nine Authors, The"
---

## Miz Maze, or, The Winkworth Puzzle: A Story in Letters by Nine Authors, The

**By Charlotte Mary Yonge**

**Published:** 1883
**Genre:** Fiction
**Format:** Book

**Publisher:** Macmillan and Co., London.

### Notes

The signatures of the nine authors appear on the reverse of the title page. They are: Frances Awdry, Mary Bramston, Christabel Rose Coleridge, A.E. Mary Anderson Morshead, Charlotte Mary Yonge, Frances Mary Peard, Mary Susanna Lee, Eleanor C. Price, Florence Wilford.

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
